## Which phase is this for?

- [ ] Phase 0 — Project Setup

## Security checklist

- [ ] No Claude API key in client code or `.env`
- [ ] RLS policies added for any new tables
- [ ] No new TypeScript types duplicated outside `packages/types`
- [ ] Pantry quantity deductions validated >= 0
- [ ] `nutrition_is_estimate = true` for any new meal log writes in MVP

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on a real device (not just simulator)
- [ ] Previous phase exit criteria still pass
